result:
## Summary

All tasks complete. **17 client tests pass, CLI and server binaries build successfully.**

### What was built

| Package | Files | Tests |
|---------|-------|-------|
| `internal/client` | `client.go`, `client_test.go` | 17 tests |
| `cmd/cli` | `main.go` | — (entrypoint) |

### Team assignments & results

- **Client Library Engineer** → HTTP client with 10 API methods (`RegisterWorkflow`, `GetWorkflow`, `ListWorkflows`, `StartRun`, `GetRun`, `ListRuns`, `GetEvents`, `CancelRun`, `Stats`, `Health`), custom `APIError` type, and 17 httptest-based tests covering all methods + error scenarios (500, 404, plain text errors, malformed JSON)

- **CLI Commands Engineer** → CLI entrypoint with 9 subcommands (`register`, `run`, `status`, `events`, `list`, `cancel`, `workflows`, `stats`, `help`), color-coded status output (green/yellow/red/blue/gray), `NO_COLOR` support, vertical event timeline, aligned table output, bar-chart stats display, `MINIFLOW_API` env var override

### Verification results
- `go mod tidy` — clean
- `go test ./internal/client/... -v` — 17/17 PASS
- `go build ./cmd/cli` — success
- `go build ./cmd/server` — success
